channel.title: Home on Vivek
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Vivek

item.title: First Sample Post
item.description: A sample post to test working of Post functionality.

item.title: About
item.description: Vivek Mishra is a passionate and versatile tech enthusiast with a knack for crafting seamless mobile experiences as a React Native developer. With a strong foundation in JavaScript and frontend development, he combines his love for clean code and minimalist design to create intuitive apps. Vivek is on a journey to master his craft while embracing a less is more philosophy in all he does.
